message:
chore(beads): advance migration-hint-ts timestamp

Routine bump of .beads/.migration-hint-ts after beads schema sync,
matching the existing cadence in the log (5653d1ef, 27bfa626,
3a1f4210, b9437ec3, d15049de, ...).

No schema migration in this commit — just the hint file advance so
subsequent beads operations pick up the current state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
